[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

What better way to begin your marital life than a romantic vacation to a place that’s full of picturesque scenery and natural beauty? We’ve used our experience and expertise to make your honeymoon experience worthwhile. If you’d like to explore some of the best romantic places in India and worldwide, call ATW Travels.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Coorg the Best Place for A Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Coorg or Kodagu is well-loved for its picturesque scenery and pleasant weather. In fact, the Britishers even called it the ‘Scotland of India’ because of its green landscape and extensive wildlife. If your idea of a romantic getaway includes starting your day with freshly-brewed coffee while admiring the scenic beauty around you, call us to book Coorg honeymoon packages that match your budget and style.

Coorg is a popular destination for newlyweds who visit to enjoy the breathtaking views of this heavenly wonderland. Coorg is also worth exploring its local culture and traditions, amply demonstrated by its food, festivals, dress, and dance forms. Don’t forget to sample some pandi curry and akki otti or seasonal delicacies like wild mushroom curry and tender bamboo shoot stir fry.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19427″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How To Plan a Romantic Coorg Honeymoon Tour?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This beautiful hill station is known for its soothing climate, exotic flora and fauna, stunning landscape, and warm people. With us, you not only get to see some of the popular places but offbeat and lesser-known places as well. We’ve curated exclusive Coorg honeymoon packages that cover plenty of sightseeing locations and adventure activities. If you’re looking to make your romantic escapade extra special, call us.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does an Average Coorg Honeymoon Package Cost?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Located on the eastern slopes of Western Ghats, Coorg offers more than just providing you with stunning views and heart-stopping waterfalls. It has a bit of everything for everyone, making it a one-stop destination for all travelers.

At ATW Travels, we have put together Coorg honeymoon packages that aren’t expensive and usually start from INR 15,000 and INR 20,000 and could go up to INR 30,000 or more, depending on where you choose to stay and what activities you partake in.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219193393{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219203514{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are the Popular Attractions in Coorg?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Coorg is a beautiful hill station that offers plenty of activities and natural attractions to visit and feel one among nature. We’ve listed below some famous and lesser-known attractions in Coorg:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Madikeri Fort” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

A prominent historical landmark famous for its Gothic architecture, elephant statues, temples, and museum; this is one of the most visited tourist locations in Coorg.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Mandalpatti Viewpoint” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Famous for coffee plantations, this beautiful wilderness is also quite close to the two known attractions- Raja’s seat and St. Michael Church.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tadiandamol Peak” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

One of the highest peaks in the Kodagu region, it attracts bird spectators, nature lovers, trekkers, photo aficionados, and anyone looking to have a great time.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19428″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Coorg for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Coorg is beautiful all year through – irrespective of when you visit the place. During December, January, and February, the temperature ranges around 10 degrees Celsius, while in summer, the temperature ranges around 25 degrees Celsius. But it could get crowded during this time as people are looking to escape from the sweltering heat. Suppose you’re planning to include adventure activities like trekking, rafting, hiking, etc., in your romantic Coorg honeymoon tour package, during the winter. But if you are looking for affordable Coorg honeymoon packages, book one during the monsoon, i.e., from June to September.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is ATW Travels the Best Travel Agency to Book Coorg Honeymoon Packages?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels has been curating customized travel experiences to hundreds of destinations within India and across the world since 1968. Whether you’re an adventure lover, traveling with family, or a honeymooning couple, we have packages for everyone. All our packages include a perfect mix of both fun and relaxation. What makes us extra special is our ability to provide tour packages to match any budget and taste preferences.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Waterfalls in Coorg for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This mystical place is predominantly known for its silvery waterfalls, which is why they are the ‘must-visit’ spots on the list. Here are some of the best waterfalls in Coorg that will make you feel as if you are dab in the middle of a romantic movie.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Abbey Falls” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This enticing waterfall is surrounded by aromatic coffee and spice plantations with water falling from a height of 70 feet, creating a view that feels straight out of a masterpiece.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19430″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Iruppu Falls” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This beautiful waterfall is a treat to the eyes. Formed from the falling of River Lakshmana Tirtha, it is also one of the most famous waterfalls in Coorg.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Mallalli Falls” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Cascading down the Pushpagiri Hills, this majestic waterfall has its unique charm and beauty, making it stand out amongst other waterfalls.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Places to Visit in Coorg for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Coorg is a beautiful hill station and worth visiting. When choosing Coorg honeymoon packages, make sure they include some of the below-mentioned places:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Gaddige Raja’s Tomb” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This place is famous for its Muhammadan-style tombs representing Indo-Saracenic architectural style. There are three tombs built for the royal family built around the 1820s.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Chettalli” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Quite close to famous attractions like Raja’s seat and Madikeri Fort, this peaceful village is known for its scenic landscape. It offers a perfect escapade for couples looking to enjoy some private time.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Namdroling Monastery Bylakuppe” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Known for its spiritual ambiance, this place has become a refugee for locals and tourists alike seeking solace and tranquility.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Coorg for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

After a long day of enjoying popular attractions in Coorg, it’s essential to find accommodation that’s comfortable and safe. Here, we’ve listed some popular resorts and homestays that are sure to make your stay memorable:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19429″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Evolve Back Coorg” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Spellbound by the aroma of spice and coffee, this stunningly designed resort has some of the best accommodation options that feel straight out of a fantasy. An infinity pool and an Ayurveda spa are a bonus.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Coorg Cliff Resorts” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

An exotic resort set in the misty hills of Coorg encased by lush greenery and dense forests; this feels like an enchanting land amidst nature while oozing luxury.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Taj Madikeri Resort & Spa Coorg” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Situated in the sprawling rainforests of Kodagu district, it offers panoramic views from the comfort of your bed and is one of the most ideal resorts for honeymooners.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

This fairy-tale wonderland has become a heavenly and romantic getaway for couples all around the country. With our best Coorg honeymoon tour packages, you can look forward to having the most beautiful time on the most beautiful trip of your lives.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646649324366{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs about Coorg Honeymoon Packages

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Coorg?
Coorg has pleasant weather throughout the year, offering unique sights and adventure opportunities each season. For couples, the winters are the best time for a romantic holiday.
Which Is the Best Month to Visit Coorg?
The best months to visit Coorg are from December to February for newlyweds when the weather is just the right kind of pleasant.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Coorg Trip?
A minimum of 3 days and a maximum of 5 days are enough to enjoy Coorg.
Is Coorg Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Yes, Coorg is more than safe for honeymoon couples attracting newlyweds from around the country.
How Can I Reach Coorg?
Despite not having its airport, getting down there by flight is the easiest way to reach Coorg. The closest international airport is Mangalore International Airport (140 km away), and for domestic flights, there is one at Mysore (120 km away). You can take any train until Mysore or Bangalore; then hire a taxi or take a state or private bus to reach Coorg. To reach Coorg, you essentially have to take the road, so if you are coming by road, it just makes the journey worthwhile as your vacation has already begun.
How Can I Travel to Coorg?
Buses are the cheapest and most convenient way to get around in Coorg. The next best is to hire a taxi or rent a car, and if even that doesn’t work for you and you would like to think of nature, you can rent a bike or just walk.
Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Coorg
Depending on the country you are coming from, you would need a valid passport and visa or e-visa. You might also need a valid e-pass from the respective district administration to visit Coorg, depending on the local circumstances at the time of the visit.
